MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
Off Calendar Dec-31-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Steven Adair MacDonald, Esq. (415) 956-6488 for Plaintiff and Moving Party Kokoris
Ahmed Moneim, Defendant Propria Persona
Abrar A. Hussain, Esq., The Safina Group LLP (650) 641-7901 appearing on behalf of Defendant Moneim
RULING:
Attorney Hussain, on behalf of Defendant Moneim Propria Persona, requests a continuance; request is untimely. PLAINTIFF SAM KOKORIS' MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES: GRANTED; no opposition was filed. Order signed and served on Defendant Moneim. (301/JLW) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
